colleges.name: Indian Institute of Technology Bombay
colleges.overview: IIT Bombay is one of India's premier engineering institutions, known for world-class research, innovation, and industry connections. Located on the Powai campus in Mumbai, it offers a vibrant academic and campus life.

reviews.author: Rahul M.
reviews.comment: Best engineering college in India. Excellent faculty and research facilities.

reviews.author: Priya S.
reviews.comment: Incredible campus life and placement opportunities. Worth every bit of JEE preparation.

reviews.author: Arjun K.
reviews.comment: Academically rigorous. The peer group here is unmatched.

colleges.name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi
colleges.overview: IIT Delhi is India's top-ranked technical university located in the heart of the nation's capital. It is renowned for cutting-edge research and strong industry linkages.

reviews.author: Sneha T.
reviews.comment: Top-notch professors and amazing research culture.

reviews.author: Karan L.
reviews.comment: Delhi location is a big advantage for networking. Campus is world-class.

colleges.name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras
colleges.overview: IIT Madras is India's #1 ranked institution as per NIRF. Known for its lush green campus, strong alumni network, and pioneering research contributions.

reviews.author: Divya R.
reviews.comment: The campus atmosphere is unbeatable. Faculty is highly research-oriented.

reviews.author: Vikram N.
reviews.comment: NIRF rank 1 says it all. Placement record is phenomenal.

colleges.name: Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur
colleges.overview: The oldest IIT in India, IIT Kharagpur has the largest campus and the most diverse academic programs. Known for its strong alumni network and residential campus experience.

reviews.author: Amit B.
reviews.comment: Oldest IIT with proud legacy. Campus life is vibrant and diverse.

reviews.author: Meera G.
reviews.comment: Great research opportunities. The campus township is a unique experience.

colleges.name: BITS Pilani
colleges.overview: BITS Pilani is one of India's top private engineering institutions. Famous for its Practice School program that provides real industry experience during the degree.

reviews.author: Rohan C.
reviews.comment: Practice School is a game-changer. Real industry exposure in the final year.

reviews.author: Ananya P.
reviews.comment: Best private engineering college in India. Peer group quality is outstanding.

colleges.name: National Institute of Technology Trichy
colleges.overview: NIT Trichy is consistently ranked as the best NIT in India. It offers a strong academic environment with a focus on engineering and technology education.

reviews.author: Subramanian V.
reviews.comment: Best NIT in India. Great faculty and placement support.

reviews.author: Kavitha M.
reviews.comment: Affordable fees with excellent placement record. Highly recommend.

colleges.name: Vellore Institute of Technology
colleges.overview: VIT is one of India's largest private universities with a strong focus on industry-oriented education. Known for its FFCS (Fully Flexible Credit System) and large campus.

reviews.author: Preethi J.
reviews.comment: Flexible credit system is a great advantage. Campus is beautiful.

reviews.author: Sathya K.
reviews.comment: Huge intake means competition is tough. But exposure is decent.

colleges.name: Manipal Institute of Technology
colleges.overview: MIT Manipal is a premier private engineering institution known for its international exposure, modern infrastructure, and diverse student community.

reviews.author: Harsh B.
reviews.comment: Great campus life. International opportunities are a plus.

reviews.author: Shruti N.
reviews.comment: Amazing infrastructure. Manipal town itself is very student-friendly.

colleges.name: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad
colleges.overview: IIM Ahmedabad is Asia's top business school and one of the world's most respected MBA programs. Known for its case-study methodology and exceptional alumni network.

reviews.author: Ravi S.
reviews.comment: Life-changing experience. The case method transforms how you think about business.

reviews.author: Neha A.
reviews.comment: Best MBA program in Asia. Alumni network is incredibly powerful.

colleges.name: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore
colleges.overview: IIM Bangalore is located in India's Silicon Valley and is renowned for its entrepreneurship focus and technology management programs.

reviews.author: Deepak M.
reviews.comment: Being in Bengaluru is a massive advantage. Startup culture is infectious.

reviews.author: Pooja R.
reviews.comment: Excellent professors and peer group. The entrepreneurship cell is world-class.

colleges.name: Delhi Technological University
colleges.overview: DTU, formerly Delhi College of Engineering, is one of Delhi's premier state engineering universities. Known for affordable fees, strong industry connections, and excellent placements.

reviews.author: Vivek S.
reviews.comment: Best government college for Delhi students. Amazing value for money.

reviews.author: Nidhi T.
reviews.comment: Delhi location means great internship and placement opportunities.

colleges.name: Christ University
colleges.overview: Christ University is a premier institution known for its liberal arts, commerce, and management programs. Located in Bangalore, it provides excellent holistic education.

reviews.author: Mary J.
reviews.comment: Great college for commerce and management. Faculty is very supportive.

reviews.author: Samuel T.
reviews.comment: Discipline is strict but the education quality makes it worth it.

colleges.name: Symbiosis Institute of Business Management
colleges.overview: SIBM Pune is among India's top private B-schools. Known for its international tie-ups, cultural diversity, and strong MBA program with excellent ROI.

reviews.author: Gaurav B.
reviews.comment: Top MBA outside IIMs. Placement record is consistent and strong.

reviews.author: Reshma P.
reviews.comment: International exposure and the Pune location make it perfect for MBA.

colleges.name: Jadavpur University
colleges.overview: Jadavpur University is one of West Bengal's most prestigious institutions, known for exceptional faculty, research output, and ultra-affordable fees for state-merit students.

reviews.author: Debabrata M.
reviews.comment: Best value engineering education in India. Professors are world-class.

reviews.author: Tanushree G.
reviews.comment: Fees are minimal but quality is premium. Highly recommended.

colleges.name: Anna University
colleges.overview: Anna University is Tamil Nadu's premier technical university, affiliating over 500 colleges. The main campus in Chennai offers excellent engineering programs at affordable rates.

reviews.author: Murugan S.
reviews.comment: Affordable and reputed. Great for Tamil Nadu students seeking quality education.

reviews.author: Janani R.
reviews.comment: Good university but placements could be better. Faculty is decent.

colleges.name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
colleges.overview: SRM University is one of India's largest private universities, known for its modern infrastructure, strong industry connections, and diverse student body.

reviews.author: Kartik V.
reviews.comment: Good infrastructure. Placements are decent for IT sector.

reviews.author: Deepa N.
reviews.comment: Campus is huge and well-maintained. Faculty quality varies by department.

colleges.name: Amity University
colleges.overview: Amity University is a large private university known for its diverse program offerings, international collaborations, and modern infrastructure near Delhi.

reviews.author: Ashwin R.
reviews.comment: Good infrastructure but fees are high for the placement outcomes.

reviews.author: Sonia M.
reviews.comment: Lots of extracurricular activities and clubs. Faculty is mixed.

colleges.name: Presidency College Chennai
colleges.overview: One of India's oldest colleges, Presidency College Chennai offers exceptional arts and science programs at extremely affordable rates under the Tamil Nadu government.

reviews.author: Rajesh K.
reviews.comment: Historic institution. Best for pure sciences at unbelievable cost.

reviews.author: Vanitha S.
reviews.comment: Legacy institution with dedicated faculty. Research culture is growing.

colleges.name: PSG College of Technology
colleges.overview: PSG Tech is one of Tamil Nadu's top autonomous engineering colleges, known for its industry-integrated curriculum and excellent placement record in Coimbatore's manufacturing and IT sectors.

reviews.author: Manivannan K.
reviews.comment: Top college in Coimbatore. Industry tie-ups are excellent.

reviews.author: Sangeetha A.
reviews.comment: Good faculty and strong alumni network in manufacturing sector.

colleges.name: National Law School of India University
colleges.overview: NLSIU Bangalore is India's #1 law school. It pioneered the 5-year integrated LLB program and has produced India's top judges, lawyers, and legal scholars.

reviews.author: Ananya V.
reviews.comment: Pinnacle of legal education in India. Clerkship and litigation opportunities are unmatched.

reviews.author: Rohan T.
reviews.comment: Best law college in the country. The peer group elevates your thinking.

colleges.name: Coimbatore Institute of Technology
colleges.overview: CIT Coimbatore is one of the oldest and most reputed engineering colleges in Tamil Nadu, known for its quality education and strong alumni network in the region.

reviews.author: Balaji S.
reviews.comment: Affordable and quality education in Coimbatore. Strong alumni support.

reviews.author: Priya M.
reviews.comment: Good faculty and campus environment. Great value college.

colleges.name: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham
colleges.overview: Amrita is a top-ranked deemed university with strong research output. Known for its focus on applied sciences, engineering, and social impact research.

reviews.author: Lakshmi P.
reviews.comment: Strong research culture. Spiritual campus environment is unique.

reviews.author: Siva K.
reviews.comment: Good NIRF ranking and solid placement record.

colleges.name: National Institute of Technology Surathkal
colleges.overview: NIT Surathkal is one of the top NITs, known for its sea-side campus, strong technical culture, and excellent alumni network in the IT sector.

reviews.author: Chethan R.
reviews.comment: Beautiful coastal campus. Strong tech culture and solid placements.

reviews.author: Pallavi S.
reviews.comment: Top NIT in Karnataka. Excellent for core engineering and IT careers.

colleges.name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology
colleges.overview: Thapar is a top private deemed university known for its engineering programs, research culture, and strong placements in IT and core sectors.

reviews.author: Gurpreet S.
reviews.comment: Best engineering college in Punjab. Strong alumni and decent placements.

reviews.author: Prabhleen K.
reviews.comment: Good faculty and research labs. Campus life is vibrant.

colleges.name: Osmania University
colleges.overview: Osmania University is one of India's oldest and most historic universities, offering diverse programs at highly affordable fees under the Telangana state government.

reviews.author: Venkat R.
reviews.comment: Historic university with beautiful heritage campus. Very affordable.

reviews.author: Sahithi P.
reviews.comment: Good arts and science programs. Placement support could be stronger.

colleges.name: Institute of Management Technology Ghaziabad
colleges.overview: IMT Ghaziabad is one of India's oldest and most respected B-schools, known for its strong industry connections, diverse student body, and consistent placement record.

reviews.author: Mohit G.
reviews.comment: Solid MBA program with consistent placements. Great faculty connections.

reviews.author: Richa V.
reviews.comment: One of the top 10 B-schools in India. Highly worth it.

colleges.name: Birla Institute of Technology Mesra
colleges.overview: BIT Mesra is a top private deemed university in Eastern India known for its engineering and technology programs, serene campus environment, and growing research output.

reviews.author: Akash C.
reviews.comment: Serene campus. Good engineering education for East India students.

reviews.author: Trishna D.
reviews.comment: Average placements but good infrastructure. Location can be a challenge.

colleges.name: Loyola College Chennai
colleges.overview: Loyola College is Chennai's premier arts and science college, known for exceptional commerce, economics, and science programs with a strong value-based education philosophy.

reviews.author: Anthony R.
reviews.comment: Best arts college in Chennai. Alumni network is strong in finance sector.

reviews.author: Christy M.
reviews.comment: Value-based education is commendable. Faculty is excellent.

colleges.name: Pune Institute of Computer Technology
colleges.overview: PICT Pune is Pune's top autonomous engineering college for computer science. Consistently ranked among Maharashtra's best colleges for IT placements.

reviews.author: Tejas M.
reviews.comment: Best CS college in Pune outside IIT/NIT. Placement record is excellent.

reviews.author: Snehal J.
reviews.comment: Great faculty and peer group. Perfect for IT careers.

colleges.name: Indian Statistical Institute
colleges.overview: ISI Kolkata is the world's finest institution for statistics and data science, founded by the legendary P.C. Mahalanobis. Extremely selective admission with government stipends.

reviews.author: Soumya C.
reviews.comment: World-class statistics education. Stipend makes it almost free. Dream college.

reviews.author: Arnab B.
reviews.comment: Elitist but worth every bit. The best place for pure math and data science.
